text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So, long story short, my legs are in a condition
where they may fail at any given moment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shortly after the Kikuka Sho, Agnes Tachyon
abruptly enters my office with this announcement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shocked, I shoot up from my chair like a rocket.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
These legs of mine possess both natural-born
speed and a fatal fragility, you see.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh! Just look at your shock. I was correct in
withholding this information until now.
choice_data_list: What is this all of a sudden?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The secret that I've been keeping. I gave you my
word. If things began going well, I would divulge
everything.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You've been quite a good guinea pig, so I
thought to reward you, scant as it may be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now with the surprises out of the way, she gets
herself settled in. The setting sun's light enters
the room and casts a soft glow across her face.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You're well aware of my profound fascination
towards the Umamusume body.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A body no different from the human body, yet
boasts a physical capacity several times higher...
Imagine just how far such a sublime mechanism
can go...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In my youth, I was convinced this grand pursuit of
mine was inevitable. Actually... the sentiment still
holds true.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In addition, as I'm a talented runner, I also
intended to push myself beyond the limit with my
own two legs.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Though, as I feared... realizing this dream has
become slightly problematic because of that
aforementioned reason.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Figuratively speaking, my engine is sound, but my
structural frame flimsy. Any slight overexertion
poses a great risk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's referring to her decisions to back out from
races. They always came so suddenly that I
thought they were on impulse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the real reason was because of her physical
condition.
choice_data_list: You kept that a secret this whole time...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well... it is what it is. It's the reason why I've been
conducting two separate studies, Plan A and Plan
B.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Plan A aims to reach the limits of speed by
strengthening my own legs with the help of
various experiments.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, Plan B foregoes the
involvement of myself and seeks to reach the
limits of speed by way of proxy. That is, with the
help of other Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I have been conducting each study
simultaneously. It was in the middle of this that
you decided to become my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You put your faith in me. You were so keen when
you proposed the idea of entering the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if recalling a fond memory, Agnes Tachyon
closes her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I know you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I know you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you're free to selfishly pin your hopes on
me. I wouldn't deny you that.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In truth, I too began to see myself running in the
Classics. However, facts are facts.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Competing at the Satsuki Sho, I realized... that
my legs simply can't endure against such fierce
competition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remember after the Satsuki Sho, when we
started planning ahead, she was insistent on
remaining uncommitted to our agenda.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The reasoning behind Agnes Tachyon's behavior
begins coming to light, piece by piece.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Progress for Plan A wasn't coming along too well.
I couldn't see myself being prepared for the peak
of this period.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Thus, I resorted to Plan B.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Plan B, in other words, the realization of her
dream with the aid of an Umamusume in her
stead...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Doesn't that mean that she'll stop racing?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Expecting my legs to fail, I began testing
concoctions that would be used on another racer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This is also why I had decided to run in the
Gekkei Hai. I simply couldn't ignore such a grand
opportunity for data collection.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It was then, however, when you unwittingly said
to me...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That you wanted to go beyond the limit together,
or something to that effect.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It seems I'm the type with an affinity to the
eccentric.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So long as the potential isn't zero, I can't quit,
now can I?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Now I finally understand what she meant.
choice_data_list: So that's why you backed out!
So that's why you backed out!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
An acute observation. The impulse to bet on Plan
A prevailed against my better judgment.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Rather, it'd be more fitting to say that you
rekindled my smoldering dreams. You're a real
troublemaker, you know.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But in the end... it is still my decision—my fatal
attraction to this thing called potential.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Without my knowing, it ate away at me from the
inside, leaving me vulnerable and brittle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her voice diminished almost to a whisper, she lets
out a quiet sigh.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Though it was because of that I finally found my
resolve—to continue Plan A until the end.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My running in the Gekkei Hai was only for the
chance to collect data with expectations that my
legs might fail. So, I withdrew.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I then dedicated myself fully to my research, with
time as my main enemy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But during summer camp, I began to see a light at
the end of the tunnel. I felt my body gaining the
capacity to endure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It was a day when she mentioned testing her
hypothesis for Plan A. That's right... It was the
first time in a while she had really exerted herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The pieces are all coming together. I'm finally
beginning to understand the truth of Agnes
Tachyon's circumstances.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. And that is why I could commit to
participating in the Kikuka Sho.
choice_data_list: (So she wasn't being driven by impulse.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well, she sure threw me for a loop with her
distant attitude.
choice_data_list: (She was making an effort this entire time!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I realized when I finished the Kikuka Sho that I
could survive the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Which is why today, as an exception, I can make
this promise.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As compensation for coming along this journey
beyond limits, I'll reward you a few victories.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All right, then, let's hear your plans for my senior
year races. I'm all ears.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days earlier you wouldn't be able to
convince me she'd turn this new leaf. My face
turning hot, I feel a lump forming in my throat.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Oh, don't cry, guinea pig!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This is the beginning of my redemption arc—you
should be smiling.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Heh-heh. You always were the emotional type.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that reminds me, this is the perfect time to
measure your stress levels.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You see, I have a deep interest in emotions at the
moment. Come here, let me borrow your finger so
I can read your heart rate.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Don't "huh" me! Didn't you become my trainer in
order to work as my guinea pig?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes reflect the light of the setting sun,
revealing a kind of innocence behind their
enigmatic veneer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I expect our goal races won't change again
anytime soon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The soonest race is a medium G1, the Osaka Hai.
With our sights firmly set, it's time to bring home
the trophy!
